content:
Gemini December 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Reflect on the partnership, count what you’ve earned
Key Dates New Moon Dec 7 (Sagittarius, 7th house) / Jupiter retrograde Dec 12 / Cold Full Moon Dec 24 (Cancer, 2nd house)
Love 7th house New Moon puts partnership front and center; Venus post-shadow clears Dec 15
Career 2nd house Cold Moon illuminates income; Capricorn season Dec 21 stabilizes shared resources
Crystal of the Month Selenite
Lucky Colors White, pale silver, translucent blue
Lucky Number 7
Affirmation I clarify the contract between myself and another; I value what I have earned.

This Month’s Energy

Gemini, December 2026 closes the year in two movements: clarify the partnership, count what you’ve earned. The New Moon in Sagittarius on December 7 falls in your 7th house of partnership, marriage, and significant others — a fresh start in the central relationship contract of your life. Then Jupiter turns retrograde on December 12 at 27°01′ Leo (your 3rd house), slowing communication projects and inviting a review of what you’ve been broadcasting. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 lands in your 2nd house of money, income, and values — a tangible, embodied close. December’s pattern: reflect on the contract early, celebrate the earned late.

Key Dates for Gemini in December 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Gemini Do / Avoid
Dec 7 New Moon in Sagittarius (your 7th house) Fresh start in partnership, marriage, contracts, working alliances Do: clarify the relationship contract, sign the agreement, mend the alliance
Avoid: avoiding the partnership decision
Dec 12 Jupiter turns retrograde in Leo (your 3rd house) Communication, writing, teaching projects slow; review what you’ve been broadcasting Do: re-edit the manuscript, audit the message, revise the newsletter
Avoid: launching a major new channel before February 2027
Dec 15 Venus post-retrograde shadow ends Love and money conversations clarify; commitments made now hold Do: finalize the price, commit to the value
Avoid: re-opening old worth-debates
Dec 21 Sun enters Capricorn (your 8th house) Capricorn season deepens shared resources, taxes, debts, intimate exchange through January Do: audit joint finances, address intimacy
Avoid: superficial money talk when depth is needed
Dec 24 Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 2nd house) Income, possessions, values, self-worth illuminated; a tangible year-end culmination Do: count the earnings, name the value, set the 2027 worth-standard
Avoid: spending past your means at the holidays
Dec 31 Year-end threshold Natural review — what 2026 taught about partnership and worth Do: name the one contract that mattered, the one value you claimed
Avoid: rushing into January without acknowledging the year

Career & Money

For Gemini, December’s career story is about clarifying central alliances. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 7th house of partnership — working alliances, contracts, agents, collaborators. If 2026 scattered your work across too many channels, this New Moon names the one partnership that matters.

Jupiter retrograde in your 3rd house of communication from December 12 — review the message. Re-edit the manuscript; audit what you’ve been broadcasting. Capricorn season (your 8th house) from December 21 deepens shared resources, taxes, and joint money — a sober close. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 2nd house of income) on December 24 is the tangible culmination: what you earned, what you’re worth. Crystals for wealth can support the audit; the practical move is clarify the partnership early, count the income late.

Love & Relationships

The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage. For Gemini, this is the love signature of the month: the central relationship is up for review. Whether romantic, business, or a deep friendship — the contract between you and another is being clarified.

Venus finishes her post-retrograde shadow on December 15 — love and worth conversations finally settle. Mercury-ruled Gemini sometimes intellectualizes love; December asks you to commit, not just analyze. Crystals for love can support the bond; the deeper practice is name the contract clearly, then value what you bring to it.

Health & Wellness

December asks Gemini to slow the mind. The 7th house Sagittarius New Moon pulls attention into partnership, while the 2nd house Cancer Cold Moon brings it back to body and resources. Mercury-ruled Gemini carries tension in the lungs, arms, hands, and nervous system — holiday overstimulation lands here first.

Selenite, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with clarity, purification, and mental calm — a useful symbolic companion for an overstimulated season. Breathwork, arms-over-the-head stretches, less screen time, and actual quiet (not just lower-volume chatter) carry you into January. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Selenite

Why Selenite fits Gemini this month. You are Mercury-ruled and December asks you to do two things at once: clarify the contract (7th house) and value what you’ve earned (2nd house). Selenite — traditionally tied to clarity, purification, mental calm, and angelic communication — is the stone that cuts through Mercury’s chatter to the clean signal. Where Citrine would warm and Aquamarine would soothe, Selenite clarifies: translucent, white, with an air-sign affinity for the high clean note. Perfect for the 7th house Sagittarius New Moon (contract) and the 2nd house Cancer Cold Moon (worth).

How to use it during December 2026. Place Selenite on your desk or where you write on December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Keep a Selenite tower or wand near your workspace through December 24.

Best date to use it: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer — hold Selenite over your throat for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming one thing you have earned and one value you will not negotiate in 2027.

Read more: Selenite Meaning and Best Crystals for Gemini.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Gemini — December 2026

When: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 2nd house).
Crystal: Selenite.
Intention: Clarify the contract; value what you have earned.

  1. Cleanse Selenite by placing it on a windowsill in moonlight on the night of December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Selenite is self-cleansing but benefits from lunar light.
  2. Set the intention in the two weeks between the New Moon and the Cold Moon (December 7–24): write down one partnership contract you’re clarifying — and three things you earned in 2026 that you may have undervalued.
  3. Act at the Cold Full Moon on December 24: hold Selenite over your throat, speak aloud the value you claim, and (if relevant) have the partnership conversation you’ve been postponing.
  4. Reflect at the Gemini New Moon in June 2027 (your 1st house): how has the clarification matured through the winter? Hold Selenite during the review.

Shop Gemini Crystals for December 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Gemini crystal guide for stones connected with communication, clarity, mental focus, and adaptability — including the Selenite that cuts through Mercury’s chatter to the clean signal. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Gemini December 2026

Is December 2026 a good month for Gemini?

It’s a clarify-and-count month. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 (your 7th house) refreshes partnership. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 (your 2nd house) celebrates income and self-worth.

How will the Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 affect Gemini?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership, marriage, and contracts — a fresh start in the central relationship of your life. Clarify the agreement; mend the alliance.

What does the Cold Moon in Cancer on December 24 mean for Gemini?

It falls in your 2nd house of income, possessions, and values — a tangible culmination. Count what you earned; set the 2027 worth-standard.

How does Jupiter retrograde (Dec 12) affect Gemini?

Jupiter retrogrades in your 3rd house of communication, writing, and teaching. Re-edit the manuscript; audit what you’ve been broadcasting rather than launching new channels.

What is the best crystal for Gemini in December 2026?

Selenite — it cuts through Mercury’s chatter to the clean signal, exactly what a 7th house Sagittarius New Moon plus a 2nd house Cancer Cold Moon demand. See the full Gemini crystal guide →
